title: About JEE Main 2026 Admit Card

detail.title: About JEE Main 2026 Admit Card
detail.short_info: JEE Main 2026 Admit Card OUT! Download hall ticket @ jeemain.nta.nic.in. Check exam dates (Jan 21-29), shift timings, dress code & exam day guidelines.

content.text: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has officially released the JEE Main Admit Card 2026 for Session 1 on January 17, 2026. The Joint Entrance Examination (Main) is India's premier engineering entrance examination, serving as the gateway to prestigious institutions including NITs, IIITs, CFTIs, and other government-funded technical institutes.

The JEE Main 2026 Hall Ticket is an essential document that every candidate must carry to the examination center. Without a valid admit card, candidates will NOT be allowed entry into the exam hall, regardless of having other identification documents.

Important Notice: All candidates must download and carry a clear printed copy of their admit card along with a self-declaration form and valid photo ID to the examination center. Digital copies or mobile displays are NOT accepted.

sections.heading: JEE Main 2026 Admit Card - Direct Download Link

content.text: Download Admit Card - Session 1 (Jan 21-24)
Download Admit Card - Remaining Dates (Jan 28-29)
Note: Admit cards for January 28-29 will be released 2-3 days before exam date

sections.heading: NTA JEE (Main) Admit Card 2026 - Quick Overview

rows: 17 January 2026 (for exams on 21-24 Jan); later for remaining dates

sections.heading: How to Download JEE Main Admit Card 2026 - Step by Step Guide

content.text: Follow these simple steps to download your JEE Main 2026 Session 1 Admit Card:

items: Visit Official Website: Go to jeemain.nta.nic.in
Locate Download Link: On the homepage, click on the link titled "Admit Card for JEE(Main)-2026 [Session-I]" or similar notification
Access Login Portal: You will be redirected to the candidate login page
Enter Credentials: Application Number: Your unique registration number, Password or Date of Birth: Choose preferred login method, Security Code: Enter the captcha displayed
Submit Details: Click on "Submit" or "Sign In" button
Download Admit Card: Your JEE Main 2026 Admit Card will appear on screen
Verify Details: Carefully check all information including: Name spelling and photograph, Exam center address, Exam date, shift, and paper type, Reporting time
Print Multiple Copies: Download PDF and take at least 2-3 clear printouts

sections.heading: JEE Main 2026 Shift Timings & Reporting Schedule

content.text: JEE Main 2026 will be conducted in two shifts daily (except for Paper 2). Candidates must report at least 2 hours before exam commencement. Here's the detailed schedule:
Note: Gates close at 8:30 AM (Shift 1) and 2:30 PM (Shift 2) sharp. Late candidates will NOT be allowed entry under any circumstances. Plan to reach at least 30-45 minutes before gate closing time.

sections.heading: Important Documents Required at JEE Main 2026 Exam Center

content.text: Mandatory Documents (MUST Carry):

items: JEE Main 2026 Admit Card - Original printed copy with clear photograph and signature
Self-Declaration Form - Properly filled and signed with witness signature

Valid Photo ID Proof (Original + Photocopy) - Any ONE of the following: Aadhaar Card (most preferred), PAN Card, Passport, Driving License, School/College ID Card with photograph, Bank Passbook with photograph
PWD Certificate (if applicable) - For candidates who claimed disability benefits
Scribe Form (if applicable) - For candidates using a scribe
Mobile phones & smartphones
Smartwatches & electronic watches
Calculators (scientific/normal)
Bluetooth devices & earphones
Cameras & recording devices
Handbags, purses, wallets
Geometry boxes & pencil boxes
Log tables & slide rules
Books, notes, printed material
Water bottles (even sealed)
Eatables of any kind
Goggles, sunglasses

sections.heading: JEE Main 2026 Exam Day Do's and Don'ts

items: Report to exam center at least 2 hours early
Carry all mandatory documents in a transparent folder
Wear clothes as per prescribed dress code
Take your allotted seat marked with Roll Number
Follow invigilator's instructions carefully
Read all questions thoroughly before answering
Use rough sheets provided for calculations
Write Name & Application Number on rough sheets
Return rough sheets before leaving exam hall
Maintain silence and discipline throughout
Approach superintendent for technical issues
Check virtual calculator functionality before exam
Do NOT carry mobile phones or electronic devices
Do NOT wear watches of any type
Do NOT bring water bottles or eatables
Do NOT wear jewelry or metallic items
Do NOT communicate with other candidates
Do NOT leave exam hall without permission
Do NOT take rough sheets out of exam hall
Do NOT argue with invigilators
Do NOT create disturbance in exam hall
Do NOT attempt unfair means
Do NOT panic during exam
Do NOT bring calculators or log books

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on NTA Admit Card 2026

items: Name of the candidate
Application number / Roll number
Date of birth
Category (General/OBC/SC/ST)
Candidate's photograph
Candidate's signature
Exam date, shift and paper
Exam centre name and address
Reporting time and gate closing time
Check exam center location on Google Maps
Plan to reach 30-45 minutes before reporting time
Keep admit card and ID proof in a clear folder
Carry extra pens and pencils
Get a good night's sleep
Eat a light, healthy breakfast
Follow all instructions given by the invigilators
Maintain silence and discipline
No use of mobile phones or electronic devices
Do not communicate with other candidates
Raise your hand if you need any assistance
Mobile phones and smartphones
Smartwatches and electronic watches
Calculators (unless specifically allowed)
Bluetooth devices and earphones
Textbooks, study materials, and notes
Bags and pouches
